title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
